graphlib/TopologicalSorter/prepare.name: prepare
graphlib/TopologicalSorter/prepare.description: Mark the graph as finished and check for cycles in the graph. If any cycle is detected, CycleError will be raised, but get_ready() can still be used to obtain as many nodes as possible until cycles block more progress. After a call to this function, the graph cannot be modified, and therefore no more nodes can be added using add(). A ValueError will be raised if the sort has been started by static_order() or get_ready(). Changed in version 3.14: prepare() can now be called more than once as l...
